Buying Guides March 31, 2017

Custom sports locker solutions for keeping your gear organized

Keep your Sports Gear Organized! Do you get annoyed when you have no convenient place to store your sports gear? When you go and grab your equipment, is it stil

  1. Home
  2. Blog
  3. Buying Guides
  4. Custom sports locker solutions for keeping your gear organized

Keep your Sports Gear Organized!

Do you get annoyed when you have no convenient place to store your sports gear? When you go and grab your equipment, is it still damp and smell bad? How about the amount of space it takes to lay out all your equipment so it dries out after a game? Well if this sounds familiar, PlayerStall Sports Lockers has a perfect solution to your problems.

Our Sports Locker Design

When we initially designed our sports locker, we wanted something that was functional and looked great. Our wood lockers are sturdy and are built to last well beyond your sports career. Our athletic lockers can handle any size sports equipment since our design is robust and strong. Our lockers are for anyone looking to dry out their football equipment, hockey equipment, baseball equipment, soccer equipment, and basketball equipment. Any of our lockers are ideal for any mudroom, garage or sports team locker room.

We have spent decades perfecting our locker design. We have focused our design on being functional and aesthetically pleasing. Our products are the perfect solution to your sports equipment storage needs. Learn more about why you should choose athletic lockers for your team.

Our sports lockers are built when you order them so we have the ability to custom make your locker to perfectly match the room they are being placed in. If you are looking for a locker to store your sports gear, PlayerStall is the most affordable, high quality locker in the industry. Discover our complete guide to custom sports lockers to learn more about what makes our lockers unique. Forget paying an arm and a leg and get a professional locker that is custom made by us. Give us a call today to find out what we can do to solve your storage needs.

custom lockersequipment storageorganization

By PlayerStall

About us

PlayerStall has been building custom wood sports lockers for collegiate and professional teams for over 30 years. Canadian-owned and operated since 1996, we offer a lifetime guarantee and free design consultation.
